notes: Seed slice replaced with a minimal compilable stub (original net/tipc/bcast.c could not be compiled standalone because of unresolved local headers socket.h/msg.h/bcast.h/link.h/name_table.h and many kernel types u32/sk_buff/etc.).
Seed slice contains tipc_bcast_init + a sibling init helper + a dummy 1-return function so structural counts (acq=2, rel=4, goto=4, ret=5, if=4) match the POC's _buggy+_fixed+main shape.
Verifier-v1 strict pass on first POC.

Query is generic: flags GFP_ATOMIC arg of kzalloc-family allocators inside likely-non-atomic setup functions (init/probe/open/setup/start/attach/bind/create/register/resume/suspend), excluding ISR/IRQ/spin/atomic/tasklet/NMI helpers. Does NOT hardcode _buggy/_fixed or any POC-specific name.
Query compiled and validated on POC mini-DB on iter 1; no repair needed. Fired on tipc_bcast_init_buggy and stayed silent on _fixed.
